controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present
controls.few_shot_policy: BootstrapFewShot with synthesis exact-label and evidence-support metric

hypothesis: A compact synthesis-backed BootstrapFewShot pass that optimizes exact normalized labels plus source-quote support will preserve schema validity while improving Gan label accuracy and evidence grounding before full validation.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
The optimizer metric is stricter than benchmark scoring: bootstrapped traces must match the normalized gold label and provide exact source-quote support when locatable.
This capped validation config is a pre-full-validation optimization check, not a published Gan benchmark reproduction.
